system.description: +2 Parry. Can add to Arm Strike Kung Fu Technique damage. -2d10 to skill rolls requiring holding other tools/weapons or hand-based Dianxue.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 5: Equipment and Goods
